Artificial Intelligence (AI) agents are autonomous programs designed to perform tasks, make decisions, and interact with environments with minimal human intervention. Below is a curated list of notable AI agents and frameworks, highlighting their features and applications. | SuperAGI | An open-source framework for developing and deploying autonomous AI agents with scalability in mind. | AgentGPT | A browser-based platform for configuring and deploying AI agents directly from the web. | BabyAGI | A simplified AI agent framework that autonomously performs tasks leveraging GPT models. | AutoGen | A multi-agent framework facilitating the development of diverse AI agents capable of complex interactions. / score=0.528 / query=open-source AI agent GitHub enterprise adoption / intent=find_customer_case / path=developer_ecosystem
